Metadata.title: bible1 — Korean worship Bible projection
Metadata.description: A Korean Bible slide and projection tool for worship services.

Home.title:
Find the passage,
and put it on screen.
Home.subtitle: Search, presenter view, and live projection stay in one operator flow so worship does not slow down.
Home.prompt: Try Ps 23, John 3:16, Genesis 1, or Korean shortcuts like 시23.
Home.privacy: Enter opens · Cmd/Ctrl+K returns to search · Live opens from the presenter screen

Search.label: Bible passage search · examples: Ps 23, John 3:16, Psalm 23:5
Search.idle: Type a passage to see chapter and verse suggestions.

Chapter.operatorHint: Enter selects · Arrow keys move · Cmd/Ctrl+K returns to search

Presenter.liveProjectorBody: Keep the presenter screen as the control room. The new tab is the clean output for the congregation, while this page continues to control verse movement and blackout.
Presenter.liveProjectorAria: Open Live Projector in a new tab

Help.title: Worship operator guide and keyboard
Help.liveBody: Live Projector opens a separate clean tab so you can move that tab to the projector or external display. The presenter screen remains the control room. The new tab is what the congregation sees; the presenter tab keeps controlling verse movement and blackout.
Help.liveNote: Browser fullscreen is still controlled by Chrome/Safari permissions. The app can request fullscreen after a user action, but no web app can remove every browser toolbar in every mode. The safest service flow is to open the Live Projector tab, move that tab to the projector display, and keep controlling from the presenter screen.
serviceSteps: From the home screen, search passages like Ps 23, John 3:16, Psalm 23:5, or 시23.
Choose the verse you want to preview from the chapter grid. Each card shows the beginning of the verse so you do not have to hover to identify it.
Use the presenter screen like the control room. Move by verse with the arrow keys, black out the audience screen with B, and move chapters with PageUp/PageDown.
When the clean output is ready for the congregation, press the Live Projector button or L to open the projection tab.
shortcuts: First / last verse in the current chapter
First verse of previous / next chapter
Open Live Projector in a new tab
Help.corpusNote: Current corpus: {chapters} chapters and {verses} verses are preserved.
Help.legacyNote: Old addresses like /Genesis1?v=3 redirect to the canonical presenter route, so existing bookmarks continue to work.
Help.syncNote: Projection settings are stored in this browser. When Supabase-backed service state is configured in deployment, multiple screens can sync more reliably.
Help.publicCorpusNote: This public repository does not include Bible text. Scripture routes require a configured authorized corpus database.

Settings.title: Projection settings
Settings.description: These settings apply immediately to the presenter screen, Live Projector, and reading view in the same browser.

NotFound.title: Passage not found
NotFound.description: This address is outside the sealed Bible corpus.
